lines.speaker: Kiyahtla
lines.text: I have little to say on this object. Congratulations on your ownership of it.

lines.speaker: Kiyahtla
lines.text: Oh, I do declare! Another perambulating soul traipses through this verdant forest!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... Hello there.

lines.speaker: Kiyahtla
lines.text: Salutations, my good compatriot! Pray, what curious happenstance is it that brings yourself out to my sylvan domicile?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your... domicile?

lines.speaker: Kiyahtla
lines.text: The rainforest! A most resplendent deviation from the cacophonous tyranny of urban existence.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's certainly more colourful, that's for sure.

lines.speaker: Kiyahtla
lines.text: Indeed! Out here, one may emancipate themselves amidst blissful tranquility.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see... So how does such a... magniloquent individual... come to be out here?

lines.speaker: Kiyahtla
lines.text: Well, it commenced when I was merely a youth, and has proceeded uninterrupted ever since.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You came out here as a child?

lines.speaker: Kiyahtla
lines.text: I was most fortuitously deposited within this locale by my progenitors, along with this extravagant bundle of novels. Behold this one!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... That's a thesaurus.

lines.speaker: Kiyahtla
lines.text: What an exquisitely scandalous read it was. Now, you seem like someone who appreciates linguistic variety! Would you care to partake in a spot of intellectual cultivation with me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure if that's quite...

lines.speaker: Kiyahtla
lines.text: I possess a cornucopia of literary marvels. This one by Di. C. Tionary is captivating.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A dictionary?

lines.speaker: Kiyahtla
lines.text: No! Di. C. Tionary. She's one of the foremost novelists of our time. Such an unparalleled way with words. I'd love to have an audience with her some day.

lines.speaker: Kiyahtla
lines.text: Tell me, have you met any of the literary greats?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've not had an opportunity to.

lines.speaker: Kiyahtla
lines.text: A tragedy, to be unequivocally certain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes... Anyway, I think I need to get going now...

lines.speaker: Kiyahtla
lines.text: Very well! I shan't exasperate you with excessive and superfluous conversation. Besides, my tomes beckon. Farewell.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you around.
